name: Mexican Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Arrange the chicken mixture on a baking dish.
3. Pour the cream of chicken soup over the chicken.
4. Add the canned tomatoes with diced chilies.
5. Sprinkle grated cheese evenly over the top.
6. Scatter nacho chips around the chicken mixture.
7. Bake in the preheated oven until heated through and cheese is melted, about 25-30 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.
